tools.name: ping
tools.description: Verify your API key and return your user ID. Use this to test authentication.

tools.name: generate_presentation
tools.description: Generate a presentation from text content. Returns a generation_id to poll. Poll get_generation_status until status is 'completed'.

input_text.description: Content to transform into slides (text, markdown, or notes)

theme_id.description: Visual theme - AMETHYST_LIGHT, NEBULA_DARK, FLAT_WHITE, DESERT_BLOOM, LAPIS_DAWN, EMERALD_FOREST, COSMIC_THREAD, DONUT, OAK, OBSIDIAN_FLOW, MIDNIGHT_EMBER, AURORA_FLUX

include_ai_images.description: Whether to generate AI images for slides

tools.name: get_generation_status
tools.description: Check the status of an async operation (presentation, slide, export, or transcript). Status values: pending, in_progress, completed, failed. Poll every 2-5 seconds. Most operations complete in 30-120 seconds.

generation_id.description: The generation ID to check status for

tools.name: get_presentations
tools.description: List all presentations owned by the authenticated user. Returns a list of presentations with their IDs and titles.

tools.name: create_slide
tools.description: Add a new slide to an existing presentation. Returns a generation_id to poll for completion.

presentation_id.description: ID of the presentation to add the slide to

slide_order.description: Position in presentation (0-indexed). Omit to append at end.

tools.name: delete_slide
tools.description: Delete a slide from a presentation.

slide_id.description: ID of the slide to delete

tools.name: export_presentation
tools.description: Export a presentation to PDF, PPTX, or get a shareable link. Returns a generation_id to poll. Download URLs available when completed.

presentation_id.description: ID of the presentation to export

tools.name: generate_transcripts
tools.description: Generate speaker notes/transcripts for slides in a presentation. Returns a generation_id to poll. Transcripts available when completed.

slide_ids.description: Specific slides to process. Omit to process all slides.

tools.name: delete_presentation
tools.description: Permanently delete a presentation and all its slides.

presentation_id.description: ID of the presentation to delete
